series_metadata.series_description: Contains all records on small agricultural waste- water entities feedlots, sludge farms, etc. Contains sampling data and inspection reports and complaints.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update in operating area ; Paper: Retain in operating area five years, destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed useful and destroy hard copy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
